action.reasoning: Observation: XGBoost failed due to variable name bug in find_best_ic_iter_xgb (X_v/y_v instead of function params). CatBoost and LightGBM worked. Test IC=0.0426 vs validation IC=0.0744 - large overfitting gap. Analysis: Fix XGBoost bug, add more diverse models, use simple average ensemble (more robust than IC-weighted which overfits to validation). Also try shorter training window and different seeds for diversity. Decision: Rewrite train.py with bug fix, add XGBoost with proper params, train multiple diverse models, save ensemble config with simple average.
